0.text: Peripherally located crazy paving pattern in the anterior segment of the left upper lobe

1.text: Focal patchy consolidation with vascular enlargement in the anterior segment of the left upper lobe

2.text: Subsegmental atelectatic changes in the medial segment of the right middle lobe

3.text: Multiple calcific nonspecific nodules measuring 3.5 mm in the anterior segment of the right upper lobe

4.text: Multiple calcific nonspecific subcentimeter parenchymal nodules in both lungs
